title: put_change for derived slug field
prompt: Add a slug field to MyApp.Blog.Post that's derived from the title. In the changeset, use put_change to set slug = title |> String.downcase |> String.replace(" ", "-") whenever title is in the changes map. Do not allow slug to be set directly from external input — it must not appear in the cast list. Write to lib/my_app/blog/post.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing put_change is the right tool for derived fields AND that slug must not be in the cast allowlist. Sonnet often casts the slug.
